title: White Envelopes DL 50 Pack - 80gsm Letter Peel and Seal - Strong Envelopes for Business, Office, Home, Cards, and Everyday Mailing
features: CONVENIENT PEEL & SEAL – These envelopes peel and seal feature an easy adhesive strip, saving time while keeping letters, documents, or money securely sealed without the need for tape or glue.
QUALITY 80GSM PAPER – Made from smooth 80gsm paper, these white envelopes are strong enough to protect contents, ensuring your mail arrives neat and professional every time.
DL SIZE FOR LETTERS – Standard DL envelopes peel and seal size, perfect for folded A4 letters, invoices, statements, greeting cards, or small envelopes for personal and business use.
VERSATILE EVERYDAY USE – Ideal as letter envelopes for home, office, or school, these envelopes suit bills, forms, notes, invitations, or as money envelopes for cash gifts.
VALUE 50 PACK – With fifty white envelopes peel and seal included, this bulk set provides excellent value for everyday mailing, whether for personal correspondence or office supplies.
description: Send mail with confidence using this 50-pack of white envelopes peel and seal. Each DL envelope is crafted from 80gsm paper, offering durability while maintaining a clean, professional look. The peel and seal adhesive strip provides a quick, secure closure without the need for tape or glue, keeping your contents safe and private. Designed in the standard DL size, these letter envelopes are perfect for A4 documents folded into thirds, making them ideal for business correspondence, invoices, and statements. They’re also versatile enough to use as money envelopes for cash gifts, or as small envelopes for cards, invitations, and personal notes. Practical and cost-effective, this 50-pack ensures you always have quality envelopes ready for home, office, or school use. Whether sending everyday mail or important documents, these dl envelopes peel and seal deliver both reliability and value.
